description: Block edits to sensitive files and directories

hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); protected=['.env', '.env.production', '.env.local', 'package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock', 'Cargo.lock', '.git/']; sys.exit(2 if any(p in path for p in protected) else 0)"
